response.justification: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience with deep proficiency in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK and Docker — all core to the role — plus direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks like Vitest. His open-source contributions and architectural breadth across languages and systems demonstrate exceptional engineering maturity and alignment with enterprise automation needs.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Vitest matching primary stack exactly
Proven AI-agent infrastructure experience and contributions to agentic workflows
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills with Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK, and CI/CD pipelines
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Kotlin/Java in recent roles despite required secondary stack
German language proficiency is only basic, which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based team
Some roles use legacy or niche tech (DLang, Ember.js), raising questions about adaptability to modern enterprise stacks
